message: 🌱 Add traefik: Add a provider for Key Value (KV) Store in Traefik v2 mission (#461)

+    "description": "Add a provider for Key Value (KV) Store in Traefik v2. This issue affects 39+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify traefik feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your traefik deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=traefik\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Add a provider for Key Value (KV) Store in Traefik v2"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant traefik resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n### Do you want to request a *feature* or report a *bug*?\n\nFeature\n\n### What did you expect to see?\n\nTraefik v1 supports dynamic config generation for and from a Key Value Store, i.e. it has a kv prov"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add a provider for Key Value (KV) Store in Traefik v2",
+        "description": "### What does this PR do?\n\nRemove reference to KV storage for Traefik CE. Per https://github.com/containous/traefik/issues/5426\n\n### More\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Add a provider for Key Value (KV) Store in Traefik is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: ### What does this PR do?\n\nRemove reference to KV storage for Traefik CE. Per https://github.com/containous/traefik/issues/5426\n\n### More. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",

+    }
